name: Immpossibe Broccoli-Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 3/4 cups Swiss cheese, fresh and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim large leaves from broccoli. Remove tough ends of lower stalks and wash broccoli thoroughly; cut florets and stems into thin slices.
2. In a saucepan, combine broccoli, onion, and 1/4 cup water. Cover and cook over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes.
3. Drain mixture thoroughly, pressing out moisture with paper towels.
4. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Stir in vegetables and pour mixture into a greased 10-inch pie plate.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until set. Let stand 10 minutes.
6. Yield: One 10-inch pie.
